top_signals.title: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
top_signals.summary: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Google to pay SpaceX $920 million a month for compute capacity at xAI data centers
top_signals.summary: Ahead of a planned IPO, SpaceX inked a deal to rent compute capacity to Google for $920 million per month for 32 months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Satoshi-era bitcoin at center of $285 billion lawsuit moves after 14 years
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Key suspect in Tochigi murder-robbery put on Interpol wanted list
top_signals.summary: At the request of Japanese police, the International Criminal Police Organization has issued a Red Notice for Kazuhiko Masuda, 48.
